story.title: The Innovation
story.p1: AeroTrack was born out of a simple idea: content creation should be hands-free, intuitive, and limitless. We set out to build the ultimate 'black technology' intelligent companion for solo creators.
story.p2: By integrating an advanced AI tracking chip directly into the hardware, we bypassed the need for clunky apps or Bluetooth tethering. You turn it on, and it follows you.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Empowering creators to capture life's best moments with unparalleled freedom and cinematic smoothness.

howItWorks.title: How Our Products Work
howItWorks.intro: Every AeroTrack product is designed to be intuitive and completely app-free. Here is how you can use each model to its full potential:

product_1.name: AeroTrack Base
steps: 1. Turn on the device and mount your phone.
2. Stand in front of the AI sensor.
3. Make the 'OK' hand gesture to start face tracking.
4. Make the 'Palm' hand gesture to pause tracking.

product_5.name: AeroTrack Pro Studio
steps: 1. Attach the dual fill lights to the sides of the mount.
2. Turn on the lights and adjust the brightness and color temperature.
3. Mount your phone and power on the tracker.
4. Use standard hand gestures to control the AI tracking.

product_8.name: AeroTrack Remote Edition
steps: 1. Power on the device and connect the Bluetooth remote to your phone.
2. Use the remote to start or stop video recording from a distance.
3. Snap photos instantly without needing to touch your phone or use a timer.
4. Enjoy seamless AI tracking paired with remote shutter control.

product_9.name: AeroTrack Extendable Edition
steps: 1. Pull the telescopic rod to extend the tripod up to your desired height.
2. Open the tripod legs for a stable base on uneven terrain.
3. Mount your device and activate the AI tracking using the 'OK' gesture.
4. Capture wide-angle shots and sweeping panoramas hands-free.
